query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime street scene enveloped in dense fog. A bright streetlamp on the left casts a strong amber glow, with additional lights visible in the distance. The dark silhouette of a person stands on the left side of the road near utility poles and overhead wires. On the right, a long single-story industrial building with a series of vertical windows stretches along the street. The fog obscures distant features so that only the nearest structures are faintly visible against the dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime street scene enveloped in dense fog with a sickly orange sodium vapor color cast permeating the entire frame. The diffused, flat lighting and crushed tonal separation create an oppressive atmosphere. A bright streetlamp on the left casts a strong amber glow, while additional lights appear as diffuse orbs in the distance with no discernible detail. The dark silhouette of a person stands on the left side of the road near utility poles and overhead wires. On the right, a long single-story industrial building with a series of vertical windows recedes into the murky haze, its surfaces rendered indistinct and lacking fine detail. The overall mood evokes unease and atmospheric distress.
